Stage 1 Modeling Report

Inlet features → Effluent targets  |  Train: 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023  |  Test: 2024  |  Run: 2

Summary

Model RF — Train RF — Test LR Baseline — Test
RMSER² RMSER² RMSER²
stage1_grab_BOD 4.489 0.923 9.941 -5.806 7.740 -3.125
stage1_grab_COD 16.689 0.871 36.130 -2.734 32.469 -2.015
stage1_grab_TSS 18.928 0.867 32.970 -29.005 15.514 -5.644
stage1_grab_pH 0.080 0.915 0.352 -0.298 0.327 -0.122
stage1_comp_BOD 6.412 0.919 5.931 -1.702 11.637 -9.400
stage1_comp_COD 24.932 0.870 30.359 -1.823 57.962 -9.288
stage1_comp_TSS 18.910 0.849 12.997 -4.467 20.361 -12.417
stage1_comp_pH 0.073 0.920 0.343 -0.151 0.423 -0.755

R² colour scale: ≥ 0.70 good 0.40–0.70 moderate < 0.40 poor

Key Observations

  • Best R² on test set: stage1_comp_pH (RF R² = -0.151)
  • Worst R² on test set: stage1_grab_TSS (RF R² = -29.005)
  • RF outperforms LR baseline (lower test RMSE) in 4 of 8 models.
  • All R² values are negative or near zero — expected at Stage 1. Inlet concentrations carry almost no signal for predicting effluent quality. Stage 2 (secondary clarifier features) will address this.
